questions.question_text: What visible technologies, platforms, or vendors does FC Porto use, and what do they imply commercially?

answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

questions.question_text: Is there evidence FC Porto is buying, reshaping vendors, or changing its commercial or digital ecosystem?
questions.query: "FC Porto" official partner commercial partner platform

answer.summary: Yes — FC Porto is actively and broadly reshaping its commercial and digital ecosystem across multiple fronts: stadium modernisation (€60–70M+), expanded vendor partnerships, new digital platforms, international strategic alliances, and a new premium/hospitality tiering model, all framed by its Strategic Plan and preparation for the 2030 FIFA World Cup.

commercial_interpretation.summary: No deterministic answer was produced for this question.

raw_structured_output.answer: Yes — FC Porto is actively and broadly reshaping its commercial and digital ecosystem across multiple fronts: stadium modernisation (€60–70M+), expanded vendor partnerships, new digital platforms, international strategic alliances, and a new premium/hospitality tiering model, all framed by its Strategic Plan and preparation for the 2030 FIFA World Cup.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.

answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.

answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

questions.question_text: What visible technologies, platforms, or vendors does FC Porto use, and what do they imply commercially?

answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

questions.query: "FC Porto" official partner commercial partner platform

answer.summary: Yes — FC Porto is actively and broadly reshaping its commercial and digital ecosystem across multiple fronts: stadium modernisation (€60–70M+), expanded vendor partnerships, new digital platforms, international strategic alliances, and a new premium/hospitality tiering model, all framed by its Strategic Plan and preparation for the 2030 FIFA World Cup.

raw_structured_output.answer: Yes — FC Porto is actively and broadly reshaping its commercial and digital ecosystem across multiple fronts: stadium modernisation (€60–70M+), expanded vendor partnerships, new digital platforms, international strategic alliances, and a new premium/hospitality tiering model, all framed by its Strategic Plan and preparation for the 2030 FIFA World Cup.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.

answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.

answer.summary: FC Porto operates a digitally progressive but infrastructure-light stack centred on Cloudflare CDN/Security, a bespoke mobile app (iOS/Android with NFC digital member cards and Apple/Google Wallet integration), a Magento-like e-commerce store at store.fcporto.pt, and a Binance-powered blockchain fan-token (PORTO). The club has a dedicated Head of Digital Transformation and a long-term 15-year Legends partnership managing global sponsorships, stadium naming rights, F&B and hospitality at Estádio do Dragão. Additional sports-tech partnerships include Scoutium for youth-athlete video analytics and Crypto Blockchain Industries for a metaverse digital world. Main commercial sponsors visible on kit and digital assets are New Balance (10+ year global kit deal), Betano (front-of-shirt, 4-year betting partnership), Super Bock, and Revigrés.

commercial_interpretation.summary: FC Porto is a top-tier Portuguese club actively investing in digital transformation: NFC-enabled digital membership cards (first in Portugal), a proprietary multi-function mobile app with in-stadium ordering (Seat Delivery), Binance fan-token monetisation, and a 15-year Legends mandate that outsources global partnership sales and stadium hospitality. The web infrastructure is standard CDN+PHP — no evidence of a modern headless CMS or enterprise CRM — suggesting digital ambition outpaces back-end maturity. The club's commercial engine is sponsor-driven (New Balance, Betano, Super Bock) rather than platform-driven, creating room for CRM, data-platform, and ticketing-system vendors to pitch layered value on top of the existing fan-app ecosystem.

opportunity_hypotheses.label: The highest-credibility commercial angle is CRM and fan-data unification: the club has NFC member cards, a mobile app with 237k+ downloads, a Binance fan token, and an e-commerce store, yet no visible enterprise CRM or CDP. A vendor offering fan-identity resolution, ticketing personalization, or loyalty-program technology could plug directly into the existing digital-member-card and Seat Delivery infrastructure — especially with a new commercial regime under president André Villas-Boas (elected April 2024) and a recently vacated Commercial Director role. Secondary opportunities include ticketing-platform modernisation and headless e-commerce for store.fcporto.pt.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.

themes.detail: Multi-phase renovation of Estádio do Dragão (infrastructure, services, technology pillars). Expanding hospitality from 4 tiers to 9 integrated 'FC Porto Premium Experiences' concepts. New ticketing solution, innovative lighting, refurbished corporate boxes, central kitchen, satellite kitchens, and autonomous Ai Fi bars for frictionless service.

New 5-year agreement (Aug 2025) expanding on a prior 15-year relationship. Legends now manages catering (first stadium-level contract of its kind in Portugal), F&B experience, global partnership sales, and fan experience transformation.

Launched Portal do Sócio (Member Portal) and bilhetes.fcporto.pt ticketing platform. Planning a Hospitality App and a 'Super App' to integrate the entire FC Porto ecosystem into a single digital environment. Adobe Commerce online store built with Toogas/Altice/Sapo.
Strategic partnership with FC Cincinnati (MLS) signed Jan 2026, built on four pillars covering sporting operations and brand expansion in European and North American markets.

Off The Pitch (player valuation, financial/salary tools), Teamworks AMS (data-driven organisational transformation), LiveTag.Pro (official video/performance analysis), Forward Associates (stadium transformation strategy), Ai Fi (autonomous retail tech).

IUMAN named new Official Underwear Partner; New Balance landmark global deal extended (10th anniversary); Betano/Kaizen shirt sponsorship renewed/strengthened; Suits Inc partnership renewed for 2025; Ithaka 25-year deal for 30% economic rights of Dragão; Binance Fan Token (PORTO); EarthCheck Silver Certification.
Long-serving Commercial Director José Pedro Dias (~10 years) departed to join Blocksport, indicating internal commercial reshaping.
